title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
summary: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
briefing: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.

title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
summary: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
briefing: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

title: Story Protocol rebrands to DATA Foundation in AI pivot
summary: Story Protocol rebrands to DATA Foundation in AI pivot
briefing: Story Protocol is now the DATA Foundation as it aims to provide licensable data to AI firms that have “run out of internet to scrape.”

title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
summary: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
briefing: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

summary: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users

title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
summary: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
briefing: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
summary: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
briefing: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

summary: Bitcoin Plummets Lower as Strategy's STRC Dives Further From $100 Mark

summary: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
briefing: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

summary: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
